title: Caridan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Caridan''' can refer to several topics related to the planet [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]:
*the [[Caridan (species)|Caridans]], the indigenous species of Carida
*The [[Caridan language]]
*[[Caridan (star)|Caridan]], the star of the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]
*or the adjective form of anything related to the planet itself

{{Disambig}}
